author.bio: A peer-to-peer hypermedia protocol to make the web faster, safer, and more open.
author.name: IPFS

content.text: Happy Friday, would you like an upgraded IPFS desktop client? We're actively seeking feedback on this 0.6.0 pre-release! https://github.com/ipfs-shipyard/ipfs-desktop/releases/tag/v0.6.0
